steps.title: Backsolving — testing choice C (13)
steps.content:
If the smaller integer is 13, then the larger integer is $2\times13+5=31$. Their product is $31\times13=403$, which is not $462$.
Fails.

steps.title: Fails. Testing choice D (14)
steps.content:
If the smaller integer is 14, then the larger integer is $2\times14+5=33$. Their product is $33\times14=462$, which matches the given product.
The answer is 14.
